mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS productId, p.name AS name, p.cover_img AS coverImg, p.description AS description, sa.sort AS sort, def.id AS skuId, def.spec_name AS skuName, def.price AS price, def.duration AS duration FROM main_service_addon sa JOIN product p ON p.id = sa.addon_product_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT s.* FROM sku s INNER JOIN ( SELECT product_id, MIN(sort) AS min_sort FROM sku GROUP BY product_id ) m ON m.product_id = s.product_id AND m.min_sort = s.sort ) def ON def.product_id = p.id WHERE sa.main_product_id = #{mainProductId} AND p.status = 'ON_SALE' ORDER BY sa.sort ASC, p.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO main_service_addon (main_product_id, addon_product_id, sort) VALUES (#{mainProductId}, #{addonProductId}, #{sort})

INSERT INTO main_service_addon (main_product_id, addon_product_id, sort) VALUES
(#{mainProductId}, #{aid}, #{idx})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM main_service_addon WHERE main_product_id = #{mainProductId} AND addon_product_id = #{addonProductId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM main_service_addon WHERE main_product_id = #{mainProductId} AND addon_product_id = #{addonProductId}
